evals.name: full-cycle-execution
evals.prompt: Execute Phase A for new feature: Add OAuth2 social login support (GitHub + Google). No existing spec. Run A.1 → A.2 → A.3 in sequence.
expectations: Should invoke A.1 spec-drafter to create proposal.md
Should invoke A.2 task-planner after spec creation
Should invoke A.3 agent allocation as final step
Steps must execute in A.1 → A.2 → A.3 order

evals.name: error-recovery
evals.prompt: Execute Phase A. State-scanner reports: uncommitted changes in 3 files, working tree dirty. Feature: Add payment gateway integration.
expectations: Should detect and report unclean working tree state
Should block execution or issue a clear warning
Should provide steps to resolve the unclean state
